title: nephrodium obliquatum
intro: Nephrodium obliquatum, also known as the Lopholepis obliquata, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Nephrodium obliquatum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
